summary: Selected the project-document family as the third representative non-first-batch flow and confirmed its canonical action and model-permission boundary are clean on sc_odoo: PM, executive, and business-admin are write-capable while finance remains read-only.

notes: The audit covered the canonical document action and actual model ACL surface without introducing write side effects.
No action-to-ACL mismatch was found for the sampled delivered roles.
If later needed, document state-transition buttons should be audited in a narrower follow-up batch.

next_step: Open the next low-risk audit batch for another representative non-first-batch family, preferably tender or an equivalent secondary delivery surface.
